title: Pervasive type assertions instead of generic DB helpers
evidence: src/books.ts:44,70,85,120 — repeated `as Book` / `as Book | undefined` casts on every db.prepare().get()/all() call
suggestion: Create a typed wrapper around better-sqlite3 prepare/get/all to eliminate manual casts

title: Mutable module-level singleton in database.ts
evidence: src/database.ts:6 — `let db: Database.Database` module-level mutable state; re-assignment via `closeDb` uses unsafe cast
suggestion: Use a factory or dependency injection pattern consistent with the app.ts approach

title: Express 5.x used but types lag behind
evidence: package.json:14 — express ^5.2.1 with @types/express ^5.0.6; Express 5 types are still evolving
suggestion: Pin Express version or add a note about type compatibility
